caption: A woman with dark hair and black-rimmed glasses is positioned against a solid dark grey background. She is wearing a light green tunic featuring a decorative embroidered neckline and a thin dark necklace. A small lapel microphone is clipped to the center of her garment. Throughout the sequence, she remains centered in the frame, speaking and gesturing slightly with her facial expressions. Her mouth opens and closes as she talks, and her gaze remains directed forward. In the bottom left corner of each scene, a small circular logo is visible next to the text "NPTEL". The setting is static, and there are no other people or objects present in the frame. The only changes between the frames are the subtle movements of her lips and head as she continues to deliver her presentation.
